displayMode.self: Each user only for their own rolls

enableBanner.name: Show banners
enableBanner.hint: Displays a banner on critical successes and critical failures.

enableSound.name: Play sounds
enableSound.hint: Plays a sound when a banner is displayed.

criticalSoundPath.name: Custom sound - critical success
criticalSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to play no custom sound.

fumbleSoundPath.name: Custom sound - critical failure
fumbleSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to play no custom sound.

displayMode.name: Display
displayMode.hint: Choose who can see the banners.
